defaults.hook_cover_term: Cole Palmer wearing a blue Chelsea jersey celebrating a goal with his arms crossed and a calm cold face, close up

videos.video_subject: Why Cole Palmer is the coldest, most ice-cold player in football - he never celebrates, scores in finals, and takes huge penalties without any nerves
videos.video_script: This man has actual ice in his veins. Cole Palmer barely smiles after a goal in his life. He came off the bench in a Euro final, scored for England against Spain, then just stood there, freezing cold. He once put four goals past a Premier League side in a single half. Penalties in front of ninety thousand people? He takes them like he's alone in his back garden. They don't call him Cold Palmer for nothing. Which makes you wonder,
